text:
How it works
• MongoDB Atlas allows users to configure absolute session timeout and idle
session timeout durations under Organization Settings.
•
In order to avoid any breakage in the current Atlas behavior, no idle session
timeout is set by default and the default absolute session timeout is set to 12
hours
Atlas:
Setting
Default
Min
Max
Idle Session Timeout
None
5 min
Absolute session timeout
Absolute Session Timeout
(mandatory)
12 hr
1 hr
12 hr
